title: BDFL — Benevolent Delegator for LLMs
excerpt: Plan deliberately. Build in parallel. Stay in control.
content_html:
Benevolent Delegator for LLMs

Plan deliberately.
Build in parallel.

BDFL is a terminal supervisor for AI agents. Create versioned plans, review diffs, approve whole plans or individual sections, delegate work to isolated workers, review every result, and stay in control.

$ npm install --global @thisisnsh/bdfl

P Planner

1 Worker

2 Worker

Review

01 approve plan

02 parallel execution

03 verify & integrate

One supervisor. Your choice of agents. More coming soon.

CODEXCLAUDE CODEOLLAMA (VIA CODEX)

01 / THE IDEA

Multiple agents.
One supervised workflow.

Use Codex, Claude Code, or Ollama independently for planning and worker roles. Work with a planning agent, compare and approve versioned plans or individual sections, then let isolated worker agents implement the approved work.

02 / IN THE TERMINAL

Multiple agents.
Every session in view.

Manage running sessions or resume closed ones. Navigate to any worker from the bottom rail to follow progress or respond when it needs attention.

bdfl 0.1.0

This demo is live. Click the top actions and agent rail.

03 / WORKFLOW

Complete Workflow

Role-specific bdfl MCP tools and the bdfl-plan skill keep planning and verification read-only while workers edit only isolated worktrees.

01

Talk

Work with a planning agent that can inspect the repository but cannot edit it.

02

Plan

Define shared decisions, owned paths, dependencies, locks, local checks, and global validation.

03

Review

Review plan versions, compare diffs, and request revisions where needed.

04

Approve

Approve exact sections. Execution stays blocked until every section is approved.

05

Build

Build eligible chunks in isolated branches and worktrees where the dependency graph allows.

06

Review

Review each worker’s actual diff and checks. Accept it or send feedback.

07

Verify

Verify the consolidated result with global checks and a fresh non-implementing agent.

08

Integrate

Integrate only after final review while the frozen target remains unchanged and clean.

04 / CONTROL SURFACE

Supervised from plan to integration.

Role-specific bdfl MCP tools constrain each agent: planners and verifiers do not edit; workers edit only isolated worktrees.

01

Deliberate & versioned planning

Browse durable plan versions, compare adjacent versions, inspect exact changes, and approve individual sections while preserving unchanged approvals.

02

Multiple agents & parallel sessions

Use Codex, Claude Code, or Ollama independently for planning and worker roles, with separate models, effort levels, and options.

03

DAG-based isolated execution

Each worker receives isolated, focused context. Independent chunks run in parallel while prerequisites and named locks keep conflicting work in order.

04

Review before integration

Inspect each worker’s summary, diff, changed paths, checks, and commit metadata. Accept the result or send feedback to the same worker.

05

Local state and safety

Each repository owns its ignored .bdfl/ runtime state. BDFL does not publish local state, metrics, analytics, or logs; use Ollama with a local model for a fully local setup.

Read the permissions model

05 / GET STARTED

Plan deliberately.
Build in parallel.

Install globally, start BDFL in a Git repository, then choose separate planning and worker agents, models, effort levels, options, and worker capacity.

$ npm install --global @thisisnsh/bdfl

Requires macOS or Linux, Node.js 20+, Git, and at least one supported agent CLI installed and authenticated.

深思熟虑和版本化的规划

blocks.html_en: Browse durable plan versions, compare adjacent versions, inspect exact changes, and approve individual sections while preserving unchanged approvals.

sentences.en: Browse durable plan versions, compare adjacent versions, inspect exact changes, and approve individual sections while preserving unchanged approvals.
sentences.zh: 浏览持久计划版本、比较相邻版本、检查确切的更改并批准各个部分，同时保留未更改的批准。
多个代理和并行会话

blocks.html_en: Use Codex, Claude Code, or Ollama independently for planning and worker roles, with separate models, effort levels, and options.

基于DAG的隔离执行

sentences.en: Independent chunks run in parallel while prerequisites and named locks keep conflicting work in order.
sentences.zh: 独立的块并行运行，而先决条件和命名锁则保持冲突的工作按顺序进行。
整合前审查

blocks.html_en: Inspect each worker’s summary, diff, changed paths, checks, and commit metadata. Accept the result or send feedback to the same worker.

sentences.en: Inspect each worker’s summary, diff, changed paths, checks, and commit metadata.
sentences.zh: 检查每个工作人员的摘要、差异、更改的路径、检查和提交元数据。

sentences.en: Accept the result or send feedback to the same worker.
sentences.zh: 接受结果或向同一工作人员发送反馈。
当地状态和安全

blocks.html_en: Each repository owns its ignored .bdfl/ runtime state. BDFL does not publish local state, metrics, analytics, or logs; use Ollama with a local model for a fully local setup.

sentences.en: Each repository owns its ignored .bdfl/ runtime state.
sentences.zh: 每个存储库都拥有其被忽略的 .bdfl/ 运行时状态。

sentences.en: BDFL does not publish local state, metrics, analytics, or logs; use Ollama with a local model for a fully local setup.
sentences.zh: BDFL 不发布本地状态、指标、分析或日志；将 Ollama 与本地模型结合使用以实现完全本地设置。
阅读权限模型

sentences.zh: 全局安装，在 Git 存储库中启动 BDFL，然后选择单独的规划和工作代理、模型、工作级别、选项和工作人员容量。

blocks.html_en: Requires macOS or Linux, Node.js 20+, Git, and at least one supported agent CLI installed and authenticated.

sentences.en: Requires macOS or Linux, Node.js 20+, Git, and at least one supported agent CLI installed and authenticated.
sentences.zh: 需要安装 macOS 或 Linux、Node.js 20+、Git 以及至少一个受支持的代理 CLI，并进行身份验证。

content_html_zh:
法学硕士的仁慈委托人

精心计划。并行构建。

BDFL 是 AI 代理的终端管理器。 创建版本化计划、审查差异、批准整个计划或单个部分、将工作委派给独立的工作人员、审查每个结果并保持控制。

$ npm install --global @thisisnsh/bdfl

规划师

1 名工人

2 工人

审查

01 批准计划

02 并行执行

03 验证与集成

主管一名。 您选择的代理商。 更多即将推出。

CODEXCLAUDE CODEOLLAMA（通过 CODEX）

01 / 想法

多个代理。一个受监督的工作流程。

独立使用 Codex、Claude Code 或 Ollama 进行规划和工作角色。 与规划代理合作，比较并批准版本化计划或各个部分，然后让独立的工作代理实施批准的工作。

02 / 在航站楼

多个代理。每个会话都在视图中。

管理正在运行的会话或恢复已关闭的会话。 从底部栏导航到任何工作人员以跟踪进度或在需要关注时做出响应。

bdfl 0.1.0

该演示已上线。 单击顶部操作和代理栏。

03 / 工作流程

完整的工作流程

特定于角色的 bdfl MCP 工具和 bdfl-plan 技能使计划和验证保持只读状态，而工作人员仅编辑独立的工作树。

01

Talk

与可以检查存储库但不能编辑它的规划代理合作。

02

Plan

定义共享决策、拥有的路径、依赖项、锁、本地检查和全局验证。

03

审查

检查计划版本、比较差异并在需要时请求修订。

04

批准

批准确切的部分。 在每个部分都获得批准之前，执行将保持阻塞状态。

05

Build

在依赖关系图允许的情况下，在独立的分支和工作树中构建合格的块。

06

审查

检查每个工人的实际差异并进行检查。 接受它或发送反馈。

07

核实

通过全局检查和新的非实施代理来验证合并结果。

08

整合

仅在最终审核后进行积分，同时冻结目标保持不变且干净。

04 / 控制面

从计划到整合都受到监督。

角色特定的 bdfl MCP 工具限制每个代理：规划者和验证者不进行编辑；工作人员仅编辑孤立的工作树。

01

深思熟虑和版本化的规划

浏览持久计划版本、比较相邻版本、检查确切的更改并批准各个部分，同时保留未更改的批准。

02

多个代理和并行会话

独立使用 Codex、Claude Code 或 Ollama 进行规划和工作角色，并具有单独的模型、工作量级别和选项。

03

基于DAG的隔离执行

每个工作人员都会收到孤立的、集中的上下文。 独立的块并行运行，而先决条件和命名锁则保持冲突的工作按顺序进行。

04

整合前审查

检查每个工作人员的摘要、差异、更改的路径、检查和提交元数据。 接受结果或向同一工作人员发送反馈。

05

当地状态和安全

每个存储库都拥有其被忽略的 .bdfl/ 运行时状态。 BDFL 不发布本地状态、指标、分析或日志；将 Ollama 与本地模型结合使用以实现完全本地设置。

阅读权限模型

05 / 开始

精心计划。并行构建。

全局安装，在 Git 存储库中启动 BDFL，然后选择单独的规划和工作代理、模型、工作级别、选项和工作人员容量。

$ npm install --global @thisisnsh/bdfl

需要安装 macOS 或 Linux、Node.js 20+、Git 以及至少一个受支持的代理 CLI，并进行身份验证。
